response.global_analysis: The video contains the conclusion of 'ETERNAL BLAZE', a talking segment, and the majority of '星天ギャラクシィクロス'. The audio phonetically matches the provided reference lyrics for '星天ギャラクシィクロス', although the JSON contains some typos (e.g., 'バステイ' instead of 'Birthday') which I have corrected based on the clear audio and the original song's lyrics. For 'ETERNAL BLAZE', the clip features the final chorus, so I have ignored the irrelevant middle-song lyrics in the JSON. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, and on-screen song titles are transcribed.

subtitles.original: 解き放って
subtitles.english: Set it free

subtitles.original: 自由の扉 開いてく
subtitles.english: Opening the door of freedom

subtitles.original: 強く果てない未来へ
subtitles.english: To a strong, endless future

subtitles.original: そう いつどこから 始まる
subtitles.english: Yes, starting from whenever, wherever

subtitles.original: お待たせみんなー！
subtitles.english: Sorry for the wait, everyone!

subtitles.original: 今年もポルカの誕生日が始まったー！
subtitles.english: Polka's birthday has begun again this year!

subtitles.original: タイトルは、あ、かっこいい、
subtitles.english: The title is, ah, so cool,

subtitles.original: 「Glitter of Love」！
subtitles.english: It's "Glitter of Love"!

subtitles.original: というわけで、ハッシュタグはこちら！
subtitles.english: So, here's the hashtag!

subtitles.original: #尾丸ポルカ生誕祭2026 でいっぱい、いっぱい呟いてねー！
subtitles.english: Tweet a lot with #OmaruPolkaBirthday2026!

subtitles.original: はい！いやー、今回のテーマがまず、
subtitles.english: Yes! Well, the theme this time is first of all,

subtitles.original: 愛と勇気と戦う女の子になってます。
subtitles.english: about girls fighting with love and courage.

subtitles.original: そして見てくださいこのステージ！えいっ！はっ！すごい広い！
subtitles.english: And look at this stage! Ei! Ha! It's so wide!

subtitles.original: なんとですね、広いんですけど、
subtitles.english: It's wide, but more importantly,

subtitles.original: まずスクリーンが超デカい！大迫力！
subtitles.english: first of all, the screen is huge! So powerful!

subtitles.original: なんとなくいつもの3倍くらい頑張ってもらいました！
subtitles.english: We somehow made it work with about three times the effort!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: というわけでですね、ここからゲストの方々が
subtitles.english: And so, from here on, many guests...

subtitles.original: たくさんいらっしゃいます！
subtitles.english: ...will be appearing!

subtitles.original: もうホロメンだけでたぶん尾丸ポルカ史上最多のゲスト数だと思っております！
subtitles.english: I think this is the most guests in Polka's history, just with Hololive members!

subtitles.original: それをね、これからノンストップでお送りするので、
subtitles.english: I'll be bringing that to you non-stop from now on,

subtitles.original: 楽しんでいってください！
subtitles.english: so please enjoy!

subtitles.original: というわけで、いくぞー！
subtitles.english: With that said, let's go!

subtitles.original: 星天ギャラクシィクロス
subtitles.english: Seiten Galaxy Cross

subtitles.original: 光と飛沫のキス
subtitles.english: A kiss of light and spray

subtitles.original: 虹のように咲かせよう
subtitles.english: Let it bloom like a rainbow

subtitles.original: 恋のような
subtitles.english: Like a romance...

subtitles.original: 虹の Birthday
subtitles.english: ...a rainbow Birthday

subtitles.original: どんな美しい日も
subtitles.english: Even on the most beautiful days

subtitles.original: 何かが生まれる 何かが死ぬ
subtitles.english: Something is born, something dies

subtitles.original: せめて歌を I love you
subtitles.english: At least through song, I love you

subtitles.original: 世界がひどい地獄だとしても
subtitles.english: Even if the world is a terrible hell

subtitles.original: せめて伝えよう I love you
subtitles.english: At least let me tell you, I love you

subtitles.original: 解放の時は来た
subtitles.english: The time for liberation has come

subtitles.original: 星降る天へと響き飛べ
subtitles.english: Resonate and fly to the star-filled sky

subtitles.original: Everybody shout!
subtitles.english: Everybody shout!

subtitles.original: Stardust!
subtitles.english: Stardust!

subtitles.original: そして奇跡は待つものじゃなくて
subtitles.english: And miracles aren't things you wait for

subtitles.original: その手で作るものと吼えろ
subtitles.english: Shout that they're things you make with your own hands

subtitles.original: 涙した過去も苦味も レクイエムにして
subtitles.english: Make the tearful past and bitterness into a requiem

subtitles.original: 聖なる全力で
subtitles.english: With all your sacred might

subtitles.original: 輝けフューチャー！
subtitles.english: Shine, future!

subtitles.original: 信じ照らせ 星天ギャラクシィクロス
subtitles.english: Believe and illuminate, Seiten Galaxy Cross

subtitles.original: 一人じゃないことを
subtitles.english: That you are not alone

subtitles.original: やがて君は知る日のため
subtitles.english: For the day you will eventually know

subtitles.original: 指先伝う熱を
subtitles.english: The heat traveling through your fingertips

subtitles.original: 分かち合って 明日に向かう
subtitles.english: Share it and face tomorrow

subtitles.original: 永久なる空に I feel you
subtitles.english: In the eternal sky, I feel you

subtitles.original: 自由の魂は 穢せはしない
subtitles.english: The soul of freedom cannot be defiled

subtitles.original: 不滅なる夢に I feel you
subtitles.english: In the immortal dream, I feel you

subtitles.original: 代償の剣を握れ
subtitles.english: Grasp the sword of compensation

subtitles.original: 運命も終局も断ち切る力で
subtitles.english: With the power to cut through fate and the finale

subtitles.original: そして奏でた勇気
subtitles.english: And the courage we played
